    15. Start date - End date
    21. Are you a citizen of the United States?*
    22. If no, are you authorized to work in the United States?
    24. Are you a resident of the Great Neck Park District?*
    26. Have you ever worked for the Park District?*
    29. Are you related to any current or former employee(s) of the Park District?
    33. Have you ever been convicted of a felony?*
    36. Continue

    2. Education

    21. References
      Please list three professional references.
    61. May we contact your previous supervisor for references?
    74. May we contact your previous supervisor for references?
    80. I certify that the information provided in this application is true and complete to the best of my knowledge. I understand withholding pertinent information or submitting false or misleading information on this application, my resume, during interviews or at any other time during the hiring process constitutes valid grounds for disqualification from further consideration for hire or immediate dismissal from employment and loss of employee benefits and privileges. I further understand and agree that the employer shall not be liable in any respect if my employment is denied or terminated. *
